title: Harness design for long-running application development
objective: Propose eval-strengthening guidance based on Harness design for long-running application development.

evidence.summary: Harness design is key to performance at the frontier of agentic coding. Here's how we pushed Claude further in frontend design and long-running autonomous software engineering.
guidance: This work originated with earlier efforts on our frontend design skill and long-running coding agent harness ,

We've previously shown that harness design has a substantial impact on the effectiveness of long running agentic coding.
